title: colocasia peregrina
intro: Colocasia peregrina, also known as elephant ear, is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its large, heart-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Colocasia peregrina include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Colocasia peregrina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, such as respiratory issues and skin conditions.
